changelog.zh:
(作为1.7过度更新使用)
1. 新增智能下载功能（自动测速+自动重试）
2. 优化下载稳定性
3. 支持多下载源无缝切换
4. 新增版本跳过功能
5. 支持强制更新
6. 更新日志支持中英文
7. 优化下载稳定性
changelog.en:
(Used as a 1.7 over update) 
1. added smart download function (auto speed test + auto retry)
2. optimized download stability
3. support seamless switching between multiple download sources
4. added version skip function
5. support forced update
6. update log support in English and Chinese
7. optimized download stability
